title: myriopteris aurea
intro: Myriopteris aurea, also known as the golden fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae and is native to the southeastern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as arthritis, wounds, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Myriopteris aurea include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or a solvent, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
